rulings.Case Title: MARY JOAN TALBOTT et al VS. ALFA LAVAL INC.(SUED INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By Defendant Warren Pumps, Llc¿S Motion To Transfer Venue To Marin County; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Richard Ames; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, July 24, 2009, line 1, Motion By Defendant Warren Pumps, LLC To Transfer Venue To Marin County. Motion to transfer venue to Marin County is denied. Defendant Plant Insulation resides in San Francisco and was named as a defendant before it filed for bankruptcy. Defendant is a New Jersey Corporation that has not designated any principal place of business in California, therefore venue is proper in any county in California. A corporate defendant challenging venue may obtain an order changing venue only to the county of its principal place of business. See Karson Industries, Inc. vs. Superior Court (1969) 273 Cal.App.2nd 7,8; Easton vs. Superior Court (1970) 12 Cal.App.3rd 243. Plaintiff's request for continuance is denied. =(302/CWW)
